summary: The user is organizing their closet and seeking tips to maximize space, including seasonal storage for clothes. They also discussed tracking pickups and returns for items, cleaning their gym bag, and maintaining workout clothes. The user plans to use boxes for seasonal storage and a notes app for tracking items.
facts: The user plans to organize their closet this weekend. The user wore new black jeans from Levi's on a dinner date last Friday. The user is storing winter clothes, including a thick grey scarf and gloves, in boxes and bringing out spring clothes like a yellow sundress. The user exchanged a pair of boots from Zara on February 5 and still needs to pick up the new pair. The user intends to use boxes they have at home to store winter clothes. The user usually remembers pickups and returns in their head but plans to use a notes app on their phone to keep track of them. The user wore their favorite yoga pants to the gym last Thursday. The user is dedicating a specific day each week to doing laundry and cleaning their gym gear. The user has a gym bag that has been smelling funky lately.
